name: Family Favorite Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Non-nutritive sweetener (Sugar Twin is best for this)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Cream margarine and sweetener until smooth.
3. Sift together baking powder, salt, and flour into a separate bowl.
4. Add the sifted dry ingredients to the creamed mixture alternately with skim milk, mixing well after each addition.
5. Stir in almond extract.
6. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form, then gently fold them into the batter.
7. Pour the batter evenly into two greased 9-inch layer pans.
8. Bake for about 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow the cakes to cool in the pans for a few minutes before turning them out onto wire racks and allowing them to cool completely.
10. Frost with Creamy Frosting. Makes 1 two-layer cake.
